acceptance_targets: [chapter_05_prose_01] Pass if, on reread of the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:293, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:325, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:399, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:455, at least three of the current comparison-led images are rendered directly rather than through 'as if' scaffolding, and no adjacent cited paragraphs rely on the same comparison formula. Fail if the opening, manuscript-unwrapping, reveal, or aftermath passages still lean on repeated 'as if' comparisons as their main descriptive move.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, on reread of the passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:293, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:325, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:399, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:455, at least three of the current comparison-led images are rendered directly rather than through 'as if' scaffolding, and no adjacent cited paragraphs rely on the same comparison formula. Fail if the opening, manuscript-unwrapping, reveal, or aftermath passages still lean on repeated 'as if' comparisons as their main descriptive move.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly falls back on comparison-led 'as if' phrasing to render sensation and thought. Used this often, the device stops feeling like a chosen image engine and starts reading as default mediation, which softens otherwise strong material prose.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the image clusters anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:293, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:325, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:399, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:455 so several current comparison-led images become direct sensory statement, concrete image, or action-level perception. Keep only the strongest one or two comparisons in those passages; do not let comparison syntax remain the default way the chapter reports pressure.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
